display_text: Bracer, Cost: 505: Early game basic item that provides modest attribute bonuses and health regeneration. Built from Circlet and Gauntlets, it is a cost-effective way to bulk up during the laning phase, transitioning into more powerful items later. Stats: Strength: +5, Agility: +2, Intelligence: +2, Health: +50, Health Regen: +0.75.

display_text: Bracer, Cost: 505: Core recipe component for powerful items like Drum of Endurance and Rod of Atos. Purchasing Bracers early in the laning stage builds into mid-game power spikes. Timing matters as its flat stat efficiency is best during the first 15 minutes. Stats: Cost: 505.
